property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28.6-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28.6-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28\bin;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28.6-hotspot\\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28.6-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28\bin;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.28\bin;%JAVA_HOME%\bin;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Exercism;.

testcase.name: games1

failure.message: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searching for dogs, the output should contain "Games: 1". The output was: File: Team

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searching for dogs, the output should contain "Games: 1". The output was: File: Team
at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:88) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:41) at SportStatisticTest.games1(SportStatisticTest.java:36) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:566) at org.junit.runners.model.FrameworkMethod$1.runReflectiveCall(FrameworkMethod.java:50) at org.junit.internal.runners.model.ReflectiveCallable.run(ReflectiveCallable.java:12) at org.junit.runners.model.FrameworkMethod.invokeExplosively(FrameworkMethod.java:47) at org.junit.internal.runners.statements.InvokeMethod.evaluate(InvokeMethod.java:17) at fi.helsinki.cs.tmc.edutestutils.MockStdio$1.evaluate(MockStdio.java:106) at org.junit.rules.RunRules.evaluate(RunRules.java:20) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner.runLeaf(ParentRunner.java:325) at org.junit.runners.BlockJUnit4ClassRunner.runChild(BlockJUnit4ClassRunner.java:78) at org.junit.runners.BlockJUnit4ClassRunner.runChild(BlockJUnit4ClassRunner.java:57) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner$3.run(ParentRunner.java:290) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner$1.schedule(ParentRunner.java:71) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner.runChildren(ParentRunner.java:288) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner.access$000(ParentRunner.java:58) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner$2.evaluate(ParentRunner.java:268) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner.run(ParentRunner.java:363) at org.apache.maven.surefire.junit4.JUnit4Provider.invoke(JUnit4Provider.java:112) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.main(ForkedBooter.java:75)

testcase.name: games2

failure.message: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searching for batman, the output should contain "Games: 2". The output was: File: Team batman superman 30 31 batman robin 1 0

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searching for batman, the output should contain "Games: 2". The output was: File: Team batman superman 30 31 batman robin 1 0

testcase.name: games3

failure.message: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searching for supergirl, the output should contain "Games: 0". The output was: File: Team

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: winsAndLosses1

failure.message: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searcing for mice the output should have the line " Wins: 1". the output was: File: Team

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searcing for mice the output should have the line " Wins: 1". the output was: File: Team
at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:88) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:41) at SportStatisticTest.winsAndLosses1(SportStatisticTest.java:93) at testcase.name: winsAndLosses2

failure.message: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searcing for cats the output should have the line " Wins: 1". the output was: File: Team cats mice 32 34 cats dogs 3 0

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: With the file: cats,mice,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searcing for cats the output should have the line " Wins: 1". the output was: File: Team cats mice 32 34 cats dogs 3 0

testcase.name: winsAndLosses3

failure.message: With the file: bestTeam,superteam,32,34 batman,superman,30,31 batman,robin,1,0 cats,dogs,3,0 When searcing for superman the output should have the line " Wins: 0". the output was: File: Team
